message:
chore(ci): regenerate conformance and certification gate artifacts

Re-run full test suite, advancing extension conformance from 0% to
26.8% coverage (60/224 extensions tested, 100% pass rate on tested).
The conformance regression gate and provider compatibility matrix both
now pass. Overall certification: 17/20 gates pass (was 15/20).

Updated platform reports with current timestamps and improved test
coverage metrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
